name: KanbanBoardBlueprint
description: A three-column Kanban board with To Do, In Progress, and Done columns. Cards display title, description, and assignee. Supports adding new cards and moving cards between columns. Ideal for project management, task boards, and workflow visualization.

visual.description: Full-width horizontal layout with three equal columns, each with a header showing column title and card count, an add card button, and a scrollable list of task cards. Cards show title, description snippet, assignee avatar, and action buttons to move between columns.

props.name: initialCards
props.description: Initial array of card objects with id, title, description, assignee, and column

props.name: columns
props.description: Array of column definitions with id and title
